scripts.dev:api: cd api-py && set -a && . ../.env.example && set +a && .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8788 --reload
scripts.verify: npm run build --prefix web && npm run typecheck --prefix web && cd api-py && .venv/bin/python -c "from app.main import app; print('verify ok:', app.title)"
scripts.docker:save: docker compose --env-file .env.example build && docker save grammar-station-api:${IMAGE_TAG:-latest} grammar-station-web:${IMAGE_TAG:-latest} -o grammar-station-images.tar
